selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next refined-fuel replay-governance reduction on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the simulation-protocol parent into controller-facing fences for anti-gating handling, explicit input and lineage handling, finite declared replay structure, non-binding failure/diagnostic handling, and loss-aware tape-grounded cache/summary/export control.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Next refined-fuel follow-on after the simulation-protocol packet is now reduced.
Strongest current sims follow-on still sitting in the immediate reduction tranche.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the replay-governance boundary tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: PROTOCOL_STATUS_CANNOT_GATE_KERNEL_ADMISSIBILITY_OR_KERNEL_MEANING
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's top-level rule that protocol status and outputs remain non-gating relative to kernel artifacts.

candidate_items.name: INPUTS_OVERLAYS_AND_DERIVED_PAYLOADS_REQUIRE_EXPLICIT_SEPARABLE_LINEAGE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's anti-hidden-dependency and anti-mutation rules around protocol inputs and outputs.

candidate_items.name: REPLAY_REQUIRES_DECLARED_FINITE_SCHEDULES_COMPLETE_TAPES_AND_NO_HIDDEN_STATE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent's replayability spine into a controller-facing fence against opaque runtime doctrine.

candidate_items.name: FAILURE_HANDLING_AND_DIAGNOSTICS_STAY_EXPLICIT_NON_BINDING_AND_NON_VERDICTAL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's anti-completion-theater and anti-diagnostic-authority posture into a usable controller fence.

candidate_items.name: CACHES_SUMMARIES_AND_EXPORTS_REMAIN_LOSS_AWARE_TAPE_GROUNDED_AND_NON_AUTHORITATIVE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's replay/export close without allowing summaries, caches, or bundles to outrank the tape.

quarantined_items.name: PROTOCOL_LANGUAGE_AS_CORRECTNESS_VALIDATION_OR_KERNEL_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent allows protocol bookkeeping while denying kernel-gating and correctness authority, so that overread must stay quarantined.

quarantined_items.name: REPLAY_AND_EXPORT_LANGUAGE_AS_COVER_FOR_HIDDEN_STATE_OR_SUMMARY_SUPREMACY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent is valuable precisely because it keeps replay vocabulary available while blocking opaque runtime dependence and summary substitution drift.

notes: This batch was produced as the twenty-seventh controller-facing A2-mid reduction in this audit thread.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
